result:
**Operational Context (2026-07-19)**

**Infrastructure:** 15 services (billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service) across 6 environments (dev, QA, production, staging, blue/green/canary).

**Operations Volume:** 200+ cumulative instances. Distribution: clean completion ~40%, ahead of schedule ~20%, manual retry required ~10%, longer than expected ~15%, warnings emitted ~15%.

**Key Outcomes:**
- Memory pressure reduced: auth-service, session-manager, metrics-collector, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline
- Error rates stabilized: export-pipeline, notification-daemon, search-indexer, webhook-relay, scheduler-core
- Alerts cleared: ingest-api, billing-worker, audit-logger (all pools), notification-daemon, search-indexer
- Queues/CPU recovered to baseline within 1 hour
- Zero customer impact; pager quiet

**Retry-Prone Services:** ingest-api redeployments, export-pipeline drains, session-manager resumption, auth-service canary, user-profile-service staging. All resolved after manual retry.

**Recent Shift Summary:**
60+ operations executed across all 15 services. Pattern: audit-logger, search-indexer, auth-service, export-pipeline, notification-daemon, payment-gateway received heaviest activity (scaling, patching, draining, redeployment, reconfiguration). Most operations showed normal latency or cleared alerts. Mixed timing on report-builder (slow on multiple pools), payment-gateway, cache-warmer, and search-indexer production (longer than expected). Scheduler-core dev redeploy required manual retry; scheduler-core staging upgrade finished ahead of schedule. User-profile-service staging patching slower than expected but manually retried successfully. All health checks passed. Smoke tests passed for critical paths (auth-service, ingest-api, session-manager, scheduler-core). Retry queues drained post-remediation. CPU baselines normalized within 1 hour post-operations.

**Documentation Updated:** audit-logger drain procedure, notification-daemon redeployment, scheduler-core downgrade, auth-service recovery, export-pipeline drain, report-builder blue config. Postmortem notes added to 5 runbooks.

**Thresholds Flagged for Next Week:** payment-gateway, notification-daemon, cache-warmer, search-indexer, metrics-collector, user-profile-service, report-builder, auth-service QA.

**Status:** Routine maintenance cycle complete. All systems stable. No escalations. Ready to continue.
